Bio

Name: end (end draconis if you must)
Pronouns: it/its, she/her
Species: dragon (DC2.Dw[H]L10mW-T-PflhtvwSksCbk^\rb,ere-,sre-,wre-,vgy-,cgy-BflAFr---NeM---!H++$---Fc/oR+++Ac++J+SU?I--#VQ+Tc++E++, or DC2.Dw Gn L Sks Cbk^\rb,ere-,sre-,wre-,vgy-,cgy- Bfl A Fr--- Ne R+++ Ac++ I--# Tc++ E++ to be brief)
Interests: learning new things, music, digital art, programming, reading




 ahhhhh i actually gotta describe myself oh no. here goes nothing

 hiya! i'm end, or end draconis if you must. i'm a girl, a dragon, and a lil bit robot on occasion. my field of expertise is in computer science, where i particularly enjoy software development and direct tech support. i pick up and drop hobbies all the time, i really enjoy learning new skills. i've tried my hand at embroidery (hope to get better), web development (clearly), wiki management (dropped now), drawing (getting better!), 3d art (modelling, sculpting, texturing, animating, the works. also getting better!), and probably more that i've forgotten. i really want to learn more about making music and drawing, i like having an artistic outlet (though i do see programming as an artistic kinda thing).

 i started this website a few years back as an escape from the swift decline of social media. i've spent a lot of my life on the computer, and the internet, and in recent years i've been trying to kinda get away from the mainstream internet to something that's all my own, and just for fun. i use this site to toy around with web design, share things i'm working on, and (hopefully) to share my thoughts 'n writing.

 if you'd like to let me know about an issue with the site, or just chat, feel free to contact me anywhere in the Contact tab!

Original Characters

Amaranth

 tag page
 Amaranth is my first OC. He's a Skywing, from the Wings of Fire (WOF) universe. You can find his bio here.

Borealis

 tag page
 Borealis is the most un-Icewing Icewing you'll ever meet. He is an Icewing, from the Wings of Fire universe. You can find his bio here.

Gharial

 tag page
 Gharial is a bit headstrong, but tries to be a good leader and give everyone a fair chance. She is a Mudwing from the Wings of Fire universe. You can find her bio here.

Moon Moon

 tag page
 Moon Moon was originally a joke character (as you may have guessed) but she's become an important side character in my canon now. They're an explorer, trying as many new things as moon can. She is a Nightwing/Rainwing hybrid from the Wings of Fire Universe. You can find its bio here.

PFLR-2

 tag page
 PFLR-2 is a robot character i modelled 'n rigged originally for a game i wanted to make (<- probably not gonna happen lol). Now it's stuck around cause i like having a robot around! no bio, and not much lore to speak of.

Saguaro

 tag page
 Saguaro is a retired veteran, now figuring out how to live the rest of his life. They're a Sandwing from the Wings of Fire universe. You can find their bio here.

Sierra

 tag page
 Sierra is a deserter, now living in the mountains alone. She is a dragon from an original story. You can find her bio here.

Snowreader

 tag page
 Snowreader is relaxed and friendly dragon. She is a Nightwing/Icewing hybrid from the Wings of Fire universe. You can find his bio here.

My Favourites

Books
  • Adventurer's Wanted, by M.L. Forman
    (nice basic fantasy, also happens to actually be me :3)
  • Amulet, by Kazu Kibuishi
    (INCREDIBLY UNDERRATED. GO READ)
  • Arc of a Scythe, by Neal Shusterman
    (mmmmmmm yes dystopia)
  • Ender's Game, by Orson Scott Card
    (old fav of mine)
  • Temeraire, by Naomi Novik
    (napoleonic wars, but with freedom fighting dragons)
  • The Giver, by Lois Lowry
    (consumed me and made me involuntarily write about the sociology)
  • The Locked Tomb, by Tamsyn Muir
    (im so confused. i love it.)
  • The Murderbot Diaries, by Martha Wells
    (autistic robot is forced to make friends. (GREAT READ. VERY WORTH IT. READ NOW))
  • Wheel of Time, by Robert Jordan
    (my fav high fantasy series. veryvery good)
  • Wings of Fire, by Tui T. Sutherland
    (dragons :3) (hang on sorry) (DRAGONS!!!!!!!!!)
Fic
  • Healed, by Sandshadow9
    (absolutely my fav fic. sooo good. read it immediately.)
  • A Song of Frost and Sand, by qibli
    (i had to pick one, but qibli's writing is ALL good)
  • Unresolved Threads, by Rurikredwolf
    (also a great 3d artist!!)
Musicians
  • The Narcissist Cookbook
  • Of Monsters and Men
Songs
  • Love Love Love, by Of Monsters and Men
    (link is an animatic, but i love it so fuck you)
  • Dragon, by The Narcissist Cookbook
    (meeeeeee :3)
  • Growing Wings, by The Land
    (also meee :3)

My Stuff

Software

  • CachyOS | current linux distro. hopped around a bit, but i'm a big fan of cachy
  • KDE Plasma | desktop environment, love the customization options and aesthetic
  • VSCodium | my fancy text editor. tried Kate a while, but it wasn't quite enough
  • Firefox | my browser, with a whole lotta addons.
  • MusicBee | old music manager & music player, kept on this list because BEST WINDOWS MUSIC MANAGER EVER
  • Strawberry | current music manager (linux). it's alright, i wanna make a better one
  • Krita | my drawing program!
  • Blender | my modelling software

Hardware

  • Gigabyte B550M-K | motherboard
  • AMD 7800XT | graphics card
  • AMD Ryzen 5600 | CPU
  • Wacom Intuos Pro | drawing tablet
i hope to never buy hardware again. still, things will break someday.

Site

Written in VSCode, Kate, and VSCodium over the years. Serverless server-side includes provided by a custom Python mini static site generator. Source code hosted on Github, and distributed from there to Neocities. end.site began on April 11, 2024.

Fonts
  • Albertus MT
    this is the font the wof books are printed in, and also the main font for end.site!
  • VCR OSD Mono
    this is a neat bitmap font i often use for navigation elements.
  • JetBrains Mono
    this is the monospaced font i use inside <code> tags.

HTML
  • old sidebar design from Sadgrl.
  • everything i ever learned from W3Schools and MDN
  • better (<label> based) tab implementation inspired by Bytemoth

CSS
  • old scrollbar code from Stephen Paton.

Javascript
  • no libraries included! most pages are NoJS, and all JS is local and unobfuscated (not necessarily readable lol)
  • some JS inspired by Zonelets and Sadgrl.

All buttons & blinkies link to their source, or to me if I made them.

Code and assets for this website may be found here, or in the source repository. The code and assets for this site may be distributed under the terms of the CC0 license (i.e. public domain). Attribution, is not necessary, but is appreciated!

Socials

tumblr

my sole social media, only mildly less insufferable than others.
main blog | art blog | dragon's hoard of dragon art

youtube

blegh google. nevertheless, free video sharing
clips channel (largely inactive) | art channel (timelapses mostly)


Last.fm (music listening stats, account not long for this world) | Artfight (often when i draw the most) | AO3 (i've written a bit, no promises for more)

Github

I'm either EndDragon438 or end_draconis (or some variation thereof) on most platforms i'm on

I am on Discord, and you can find me in the r/Neocities server helping out on occasion

Email: end-drake@protonmail.com | Download PGP Key
